name: Bard
text: +(2) Receive a Boon.

name: Blessed Village
text: +1 Card +2 Actions | When you gain this, take a Boon. Receive it now or at the start of your next turn.

name: Cemetery
text: {2} | When you gain this, trash up to 4 cards from your hand. Heirloom: Haunted Mirror

name: Haunted Mirror
text: (1) | When you trash this, you may discard an Action card, to gain a Ghost.

name: Changeling
text: Trash this. Gain a copy of a card you have in play. | In games using this, when you gain a card costing (3) or more, you may exchange it for a Changeling.

name: Cobbler
text: At the start of your next turn, gain a card to your hand costing up to (4).

name: Conclave
text: +(2) You may play an Action card from your hand that you dont have a copy of in play. If you do, +1 Action.

name: Crypt
text: Set aside any number of nonDuration Treasures you have in play, face down (under this). While any remain, at the start of each of your turns, put one of them into your hand.

name: Cursed Village
text: +2 Actions Draw until you have 6 cards in hand. | When you gain this, receive a Hex.

name: Den of Sin
text: At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards. | This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

name: Devil's Workshop
text: If the number of cards youve gained this turn is: gain an Imp; gain a card costing up to (4); gain a Gold.

name: Druid
text: +1 Buy Receive one of the setaside Boons (leaving it there). | Setup: Set aside the top 3 Boons face up.

name: Exorcist
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a cheaper Spirit from one of the Spirit piles.

name: Faithful Hound
text: +2 Cards | When you discard this other than during Cleanup, you may set it aside, and put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Fool
text: If you arent the player with Lost in the Woods: take it, take 3 Boons, and receive the Boons in any order. Heirloom: Lucky Coin

name: Lost in the Woods
text: At the start of your turn, you may discard a card to receive a Boon.

name: Lucky Coin
text: (1) Gain a Silver.

name: Ghost
text: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal an Action. Discard the other cards and set aside the Action. At the start of your next turn, play it twice. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Ghost Town
text: At the start of your next turn, +1 Card and +1 Action. | This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

name: Guardian
text: At the start of your next turn, +(1). Until then, when another player plays an Attack card, it doesnt affect you. | This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

name: Idol
text: (2) If you have an odd number of Idols in play (counting this), receive a Boon; otherwise, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Imp
text: +2 Cards You may play an Action card from your hand that you dont have a copy of in play. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Leprechaun
text: Gain a Gold. If you have exactly 7 cards in play, gain a Wish. Otherwise, receive a Hex.

name: Monastery
text: For each card youve gained this turn, you may trash a card from your hand or a Copper you have in play.

name: Necromancer
text: Choose a face up, nonDuration Action card in the trash. Turn it face down for the turn, and play it, leaving it there. | Setup: Put the 3 Zombies into the trash.

name: Zombie Apprentice
text: You may trash an Action card from your hand for +3 Cards and +1 Action.

name: Zombie Mason
text: Trash the top card of your deck. You may gain a card costing up to (1) more than it.

name: Zombie Spy
text: +1 Card +1 Action Look at the top card of your deck. Discard it or put it back.

name: Night Watchman
text: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck, discard any number, and put the rest back in any order. | This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

name: Pixie
text: +1 Card +1 Action Discard the top Boon. You may trash this to receive that Boon twice. Heirloom: Goat

name: Goat
text: (1) You may trash a card from your hand.

name: Pooka
text: You may trash a Treasure other than Cursed Gold from your hand, for +4 Cards. Heirloom: Cursed Gold

name: Cursed Gold
text: (3) Gain a Curse.

name: Raider
text: Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of a card you have in play (or reveals they cant). At the start of your next turn, +(3).

name: Sacred Grove
text: +1 Buy +(3) Receive a Boon. If it doesnt give +(1), each other player may receive it.

name: Secret Cave
text: +1 Card +1 Action You may discard 3 cards. If you did, then at the start of your next turn, +(3). Heirloom: Magic Lamp

name: Magic Lamp
text: (1) If there are at least 6 cards that you have exactly 1 copy of in play (counting this), trash this. If you did, gain 3 Wishes.

name: Shepherd
text: +1 Action Discard any number of Victory cards, revealing them. +2 Cards per card discarded. Heirloom: Pasture

name: Pasture
text: (1) | Worth {1} per Estate you have.

name: Skulk
text: +1 Buy Each other player receives the next Hex. | When you gain this, gain a Gold.

name: Tormentor
text: +(2) If you have no other cards in play, gain an Imp. Otherwise, each other player receives the next Hex.

name: Tracker
text: +(1) This turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck. Receive a Boon. Heirloom: Pouch

name: Tragic Hero
text: +3 Cards +1 Buy If you have 8 or more cards in hand (after drawing), trash this and gain a Treasure.

name: Vampire
text: Each other player receives the next Hex. Gain a card costing up to (5) other than a Vampire. Exchange this for a Bat.

name: Bat
text: Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. If you trashed at least one, exchange this for a Vampire. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Werewolf
text: If its your Night phase, each other player receives the next Hex. Otherwise, +3 Cards.

name: Will-o'-Wisp
text: +1 Card +1 Action Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs (2) or less, put it into your hand. (This is not in the Supply.)

name: Wish
text: +1 Action Return this to its pile. If you did, gain a card to your hand costing up to (6). (This is not in the Supply.)

name: The Field's Gift
text: +1 Action +(1) (Keep this until Cleanup.)

name: The Flame's Gift
text: You may trash a card from your hand.

name: The Forest's Gift
text: +1 Buy +(1) (Keep this until Cleanup.)

name: The Moon's Gift
text: Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

name: The Mountain's Gift
text: Gain a Silver.

name: The River's Gift
text: +1 Card at the end of this turn. (Keep this until Cleanup.)

name: The Sea's Gift
text: +1 Card

name: The Sky's Gift
text: You may discard 3 cards to gain a Gold.

name: The Sun's Gift
text: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them and put the rest back in any order.

name: The Swamp's Gift
text: Gain a WilloWisp.

name: The Earth's Gift
text: You may discard a Treasure to gain a card costing up to (4).

name: The Wind's Gift
text: +2 Cards Discard 2 cards.

name: Bad Omens
text: Put your deck into your discard pile. Look through it and put 2 Coppers from it onto your deck (or reveal you cant).

name: Delusion
text: If you dont have Deluded or Envious, take Deluded.

name: Deluded
text: At the start of your Buy phase, return this, and you cant buy Actions this turn.

name: Envy
text: If you dont have Deluded or Envious, take Envious.

name: Envious
text: At the start of your Buy phase, return this, and Silver and Gold make (1) this turn.

name: Famine
text: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Discard the Actions. Shuffle the rest into your deck.

name: Fear
text: If you have at least 5 cards in hand, discard an Action or Treasure (or reveal you cant).

name: Greed
text: Gain a Copper onto your deck.

name: Haunting
text: If you have at least 4 cards in hand, put one of them onto your deck.

name: Locusts
text: Trash the top card of your deck. If its Copper or Estate, gain a Curse. Otherwise, gain a cheaper card that shares a type with it.

name: Misery
text: If this is your first Misery this game, take Miserable. Otherwise, flip it over to Twice Miserable.

name: Plague
text: Gain a Curse to your hand.

name: Poverty
text: Discard down to 3 cards in hand.

name: War
text: Reveal cards from your deck until revealing one costing (3) or (4). Trash it and discard the rest.
